name: ci_testes_inteligentes
description: Projeto de pipelines de CI com Playwright, GitHub Actions e testes assistidos por IA.

scripts.metrics:manual: node scripts/summarize-metrics.js --suite manual --name "CI Manual Tests" --input test-results/results.json --output-dir metrics --artifacts-path test-results
scripts.metrics:ai: node scripts/summarize-metrics.js --suite ai --name "CI AI-Assisted Tests" --input test-results/results.json --output-dir metrics --artifacts-path test-results
